title: The 2024 Movie Star Ranking: 35 Under 35
format: Sean and Amanda's fourth 35-under-35 movie-star ranking: 14 new entrants, nine aged out, and a countdown from Brie Larson to Margot Robbie.

films.title: Wonka
films.note: Part of the recent run of star-driven hits.

films.title: Dune: Part Two
films.note: Crossed $700M; looms over the whole list.

films.title: Anyone But You
films.note: A phenomenon carried by its stars' fame.

films.title: Bob Marley: One Love
films.note: Two leads just outside the 35 zone.

films.title: Challengers
films.note: The score Amanda can't stop dancing to.

segments.heading: Aged out, cut, and just missed
